summary: Made a minimal seam pass by reworking the opening away from the same office-entry scaffold used in the Chapter 11 boundary excerpt, adding a light final bridge that sharpens why the apartment pushes Nate back to the office next chapter, and replacing calibration-only example-line matches that appeared verbatim.
edits: Reframed the opening around the ringing desk phone and copier instead of another office-description entry.
Added one end-of-chapter sentence to emphasize the apartment as the wrong place for Nate's notebook work before Chapter 11.
Replaced standalone "Yeah." lines that matched a calibration-only style-bible example verbatim.
